name: bouncer-extension
description: Security-first Chrome Extension for scraping web content with PII redaction

scripts.dev: echo 'Development mode - load unpacked extension from Chrome'
scripts.icons: echo 'Icons already generated. To regenerate, run: npm install sharp && node scripts/generate-icons.js'

comments.dependencies: Runtime dependencies (Readability.js, Turndown) are vendored in /vendor directory - see manifest.json
comments.icons: Icons already generated. Sharp removed to save 20MB+ - reinstall only if regenerating icons
